title: Apothecary Jars Glass Decorative Candy Jars,Candy Buffet Display, Elegant Storage Jar, Decorative Wedding Candy Organizer Canisters with Lids
description:
About this item
【Handblown Glass Star】Made from high quality hand-blown high-end sturdy clear glass，A little air bubbles on the bottle body is normal. These footed classic style apothecary jars are made from high-quality clear glass and has a unique shape that works for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more.
【Beautiful Shape】Our Glass Jars has a unique shape that works for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more. They has a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for easy opening and closing.
【Decorative Glass Jar】These Glass Apothecary Jars is great for displaying decorative spheres, fruit, stones, flowers, or any other item you wish to coordinate with your decor. Fill it with Christmas ornaments during the holidays, with lemons for a gorgeous table or kitchen display, with glass pebbles and flowers, or fill it with potpourri!
【Wide Range of Uses】Those Clear Glass Apothecary Jars ideal for personal use and special events like weddings, receptions, buffets, holiday and family gatherings, buffets and all kinds of parties.Give your home a perfect touch of refined style with this beautiful apothecary jars for elegant taste.
【Product Size Specifications】Tall Glass Apothecary Jar really stands out on your candy store countertops. 15"H x 3.8W" and 47 oz.
【Satisfaction Gauranteed】If quality and transport damage problems can choose a replacement or refund .Do not hesitate to contact us,we will help you ASAP.Customer satisfaction is on our top priority.
【Special Note】This is a hand-blown glass product, which is a handmade craft. Some bubbles, material lines and other handmade traces are normal process phenomena. Please be aware of this. Original carton packaging, glass products are easy to get dusty. If there is dust on the goods received, please wash it with clean water and wipe it dry. (Please be careful if you mind)

reviews_5s: I got this to create a terrarium with and I'm very happy with it. The glass is nice and it all arrived in one piece, so no complaints. My only issue is that it arrived covered in some kind of greasy film. I assume this is from the manufacturing process and it washed off with dish soap, so it's not a big deal.This was really cute jar I used store candy in my kitchen! It was the perfect amount of space and added a dainty element to the kitchen. There was dirt caked up in the rim so I would’ve liked it to be packaged better but overall nice jar.Apothecary jars are so versatile- they can hold coffee beans in the kitchen, cotton balls in the bathroom, candy at a wedding or fairy lights in the living room. This is a small apothecary jar making it perfect in the bathroom.I think this looks so fun, great decor that is versatile for any season. It’s pretty big, so can fit larger filled items. I’m happy with it.Nice glass, exactly what was expected from a large apothecary jar purchase. Manufacturer provides it in its own molded foam packaging for safe arrival.I plan to use this for some terrariums and its perfect and so cute
